summary: Spec review accepts the Stage 5 Harbor validation runtime and private evidence policy batch for issues #115, #116, #117, #120, #121, and #122.
reviewed_validation_summary: pnpm typecheck; pnpm test; pnpm smoke:runtime; git diff --check passed locally on HARBOR-115.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps Harbor as runtime/session/evidence refs and private capture lifecycle truth owner and excludes hosted browser, raw private material, production pages, and Stage 6.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The plan limits edits to Runtime API fixture facts, tests, smoke output, and HARBOR-115 carrier.
